name: nathan-vale-claude-code
description: Nathan's personal Claude Code setup with productivity commands, specialized agents, and custom skills for dotfiles management and development workflows

commands.name: index
commands.description: Create or update PROJECT_INDEX.json for codebase awareness

commands.name: merge
commands.description: Merge a PR and clean up worktree and branches

commands.name: next
commands.description: Start the next highest-priority READY task

commands.name: pm
commands.description: Project Manager - task execution and status tracking

commands.name: start
commands.description: Universal task starter - works in any project

commands.name: start-review
commands.description: Decompose a review into individual task files

commands.name: attach-trace
commands.description: Phase B attachment migration with trace logging

commands.name: review-code
commands.description: Comprehensive code review across 7 quality dimensions

commands.name: analyze-last-run
commands.description: Analyze the last Claude Code run

commands.name: sw-mode
commands.description: Create or edit SuperWhisper custom modes

agents.name: code-analyzer
agents.description: Analyze code changes for potential bugs and trace logic flow

agents.name: file-analyzer
agents.description: Analyze and summarize file contents, particularly log files
